CustomField.description: The cluster ID from nepa_cluster_id__c on PublicComplaint records. When a modification is driven by a group of near-duplicate comments (e.g., 500 form letters citing the same concern), use this field instead of linking each comment individually to avoid governor limits and noise in the attribution report. Matches nepa_cluster_id__c values set by the AI Triage Agent.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Cluster ID from the AI triage agent's near-duplicate grouping. Use when 10+ comments share the same concern.
CustomField.label: Attributed Cluster ID
